combined_text: How Long Does It Take For A Bed Bug Infestation To Develop? How Long Does It Take For A Bed Bug Infestation To Develop? By Chris Williams on February 6, 2012. I was recently sent to a job to inspect for Bed Bugs . Previous tenants had been treated for bed bugs and have moved out. Management wanted to know two things: How long has the unit been infested, and
